---
title: "About"
toc-location: left
---

## Background

Hi, I'm Alina Bolshakova. I am a finance professional with 11 years of experience spanning financial planning, budgeting, and performance analysis. Currently a Team Lead and Finance Business Partner, combining strategic decision-making and team management with hands-on analytical work — building financial models, writing SQL to extract insights, and translating numbers into actionable business strategies.

## Data Analysis

After over a decade in finance, I recognised that the most impactful decisions are driven by data. This led me to explore data science — learning Python, building visualisations, and applying analytical techniques to real-world problems. I'm currently deepening these skills to bridge the gap between traditional finance and modern data-driven approaches.

## Skills

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
{{< fa chart-line >}} Financial Planning & Analysis

{{< fa database >}} SQL

{{< fa code >}} Python
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
{{< fa chart-bar >}} Data Visualisation

{{< fa users >}} Team Leadership

{{< fa file-excel >}} Advanced Excel & Financial Modelling
:::
::::

## Education

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**MSc in Business Analytics** — *Dublin City University*

**Bachelor's and Master's in Economics and Management** — *Voronezh State University*
:::

## Beyond Work

When I'm not crunching numbers, you'll find me exploring Dublin, reading about behavioural economics, or experimenting with data visualisation techniques to tell compelling stories with data.

---

*Feel free to connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alina-bolshakova/){target=_blank} or check out my work on [GitHub](https://github.com/AyaBlck){target=_blank}.*
